content.en:
Ye Tian's body is only in the realm of the cosmic gods, and naturally he can't refine the barren tower, so he can only refine it by this second deity.

And since Ye Tian's second deity controlled the Wasteland, and the Wasteland Tower was connected to the Wasteland, refining the Wasteland Tower was much easier than imagined.

It only took half a year for Ye Tian to successfully refine this supreme treasure, the Desolate Tower.

After refining the Wasteland Tower, Ye Tian completely controlled the Wasteland Tower and became the owner of the Wasteland Tower.

Wow!

Ye Tian instantly entered the barren tower.

The Desert Tower does not have a machine spirit, but it has its own rules, and it operates according to the rules.

Ye Tian became the owner of the Wasteland Tower, so he could know everything in the Wasteland Tower.

Soon, Ye Tian came to a space in the deepest part of the Wasteland Tower.

......

"This is the Desolate Ancient Hall in the deepest part of the Desolate Tower, and the Innate Gods such as the Desolate Zun have never entered, I should be the first creature to come in after the Innate Desolate Clan!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

There are many rare classics in the Ancient Palace, which record many secrets and some secret techniques of the innate desolate clan.

Ye Tian didn't have much interest in the secret art of the Congenital Desolate Clan, after all, it was a secret technique for the Innate Gods, and it was of little use to other races.

And Ye Tian was interested in the classics that recorded some secrets, and that was what he was interested in.

After all, the wasteland also comes from chaos, and there may be a book that records the secrets of chaos.

Immediately, Ye Tian looked at these classics one by one.

The material of these texts is very special, almost immortal, and with the particularity of this space, these texts are very intact.

Soon, Ye Tian found a classic book that interested him very much.

"Innate Chaos Life!"

Ye Tian knew from this classic that there was a kind of life form in the chaos, which was a kind of life born from the chaos, and the innate chaos life had many races, and its strength was extremely terrifying, and it could give birth to offspring, and it could derive offspring and become an innate family, which was an innate life in the chaos and had great potential.

"Each of the innate chaotic beings is much more powerful than the supreme in the universe, equivalent to the realm of the transcendent, but unfortunately the universe life cannot have such a powerful bloodline, and it is too difficult for the universe life to transcend!"

Ye Tian couldn't help but sigh.

After watching it for a while, he didn't pay attention to the innate chaotic life, after all, this content was useless to him, and could only be used as knowledge to expand his knowledge.

Afterwards, Ye Tian continued to flip through the remaining classics.

Finally, a classic that Ye Tian cared about very much appeared.

"Universe!"

This is a book about the introduction of the universe.

It stands to reason that Ye Tian knows the universe very well, but that is just a simple understanding.

The strong in the chaos must know the existence of the universe, although they cannot enter the interior of the universe, but there must be a lot of research on the universe, and there are even forces in the chaos who are trying their best to study the universe.

Therefore, he wanted to know what other secrets of the universe he did not know.

For example, the collapse of the universe and so on.

"I hope this book can tell me more secrets!"

Ye Tian said expectantly.

He continued to flip through it, absorbing every single one of them.

Time passed slowly, and a few hours passed quickly.

At this time, Ye Tian closed the book and sighed deeply.

"It turns out that the universe is so wonderful, I know too little about the universe!"

Ye Tian muttered.

From the classics, he knew that although the universe would fall into the Great Destruction of the Universe again and again, it was not eternal, and that the time of a Great Destruction of the Universe was one cosmic epoch, and a universe would go through a maximum of 10,000 cosmic epochs.

Once the 10,000 cosmic epochs are reached, the universe will be completely shattered and dissipated into chaos.

The universe has a lifespan of 10,000 cosmic epochs, and now this universe is only in the thirteenth cosmic era, which can be said to be very young and a nascent universe.

"The universe has a lifespan of 10,000 epochs, and every 12 epochs of the universe is a cosmic reincarnation, and the 13th cosmic epoch is a new epoch of reincarnation, and the universe at this time is in the weakest state. The Thirteenth Cosmic Epoch's Cosmic Origin is self-preservation, and many rules will be shielded. No wonder, this universe is difficult to cultivate the body and soul, it turns out that it has been suppressed. "

Ye Tian suddenly realized.

The classics also tell about the Great Destruction of the Universe, and any cosmic creature who wants to get rid of the Great Destruction of the Universe can only transcend the universe, enter the chaos, and become a transcendent being.

It is also the only chance for life in the universe.

If you don't want to break away from the universe through transcendence, unless the power in the chaos pays a certain price, you can forcibly take out that person's soul from the origin of the universe and leave the universe.

And the price is so great that ordinary powers cannot afford it.

"The method of detachment is also mentioned above, which is similar to what Yuntan Tianjun said, but there is one more. Yuntan Heavenly Monarch only knew two methods of detachment, but the third method of detachment was mentioned above. "

Ye Tian looked at the third method of detachment and was shocked by the above aspects.

"The Law of Dual Universe Transcendence!"

This is a shortcut, which uses two universes to collide to form a rare dual-universe state.

But the two colliding universes must be extremely weak universes, and the origin of the universe is suppressed, otherwise once the two universes collide, the origin of the universe will swallow each other, which will lead to chaos in the universe, and even lead to the arrival of the great collapse of the universe.

Only if the origin of the two universes is suppressed, it will not be able to cause the great destruction of the universe.

Once the two universes are in a bicosmic state, there will be a connection point.

At this time, the top supreme breaks out of this universe, enters another universe, and comprehends the rules of another universe, and it is very likely that he will go further.

And you can gather a certain amount of luck in another universe, combine the luck of the two universes, and then take advantage of the situation where the origin of the universe is suppressed, so as to break the rules in one fell swoop and become a detached person.

When this happens, the chances of becoming a detached person are many times higher than in other cases.

But it is almost unrealistic to create a dual universe state, and there must be the help of the forces in chaos, otherwise how can the two universes collide in chaos.

Moreover, if the origin of the universe wants to be suppressed, it needs the cooperation of the forces within the universe.

"How can the forces within the universe cooperate with the forces in the chaos......?

Ye Tianzheng wanted to say that it was impossible, but suddenly remembered those forces in the Twelve Universe Eras.

"Isn't it ......"

Ye Tian's pupils shrank sharply.

"Whether the supremes of the twelve universe epochs will reincarnate in this new era is because of the help of some force or a strong person in the chaos, otherwise how could they have created the method of reincarnation to avoid the great destruction of the universe. It seems that those forces of the Twelve Universe Epochs are likely to be involved in the Law of the Dual Universes. "

Ye Tian muttered.

In addition, there is another possibility of the method of the dual universe, and that is to create a higher universe.

As mentioned in the classics, there are several rare high-level universes in Chaos, which seem to be the fusion of the two universes, but the success rate is very low.

Once the fusion of the two universes fails, both universes will be completely annihilated, and unless they are separated before the fusion of the two universes ends, they will both die.

"If the forces of the Twelve Universe Epochs are carrying out the Law of the Dual Universes, then the problem is too big. But yes, they can't avoid the Universe Apocalypse, this is their last chance, and they will definitely take the risk!"

Ye Tian said darkly.
